title: VVP internal error for string assigned inside a case
code_blocks:
$ iverilog -g2012 test.v
$ vvp a.out
DIRECT ASSIGNED STRING is WORKING
internal error: 18vvp_fun_anyedge_sa: recv_string(IDLE) not implemented
vvp: vvp_net.cc:3339: virtual void vvp_net_fun_t::recv_string(vvp_net_ptr_t, const string&, vvp_context_t): Assertion `0' failed.
Aborted
